title: 4096-step screening baseline refresh

queries: stage3 screening baseline refresh test subset variance 4096
test subset selection variance baseline rerun graph llm

evidence.why_now: The Stage 3 screening protocol was widened from 128 to 4096 evaluation/test-subset steps. The old strict baselines are therefore no longer protocol-matched and must be rerun before further candidate comparison.

hypothesis: No model change. Rerunning the current Stage 2 merged line under the new 4096-step screening protocol should provide lower-variance strict baselines for subsequent Stage 3 candidate judgment.
notes: This bundle is for protocol refresh only.
Do not judge it against the old 128-step strict baselines.
Use its final subset-test metrics to replace screening_baseline_metrics in baseline_registry.json.
Cancelled on 2026-05-05 after the protocol was revised from 4096 to 512 for better tuning efficiency.
Do not use these partial 4096-step logs as the new strict baseline.
